diagrams.title: Imaging System Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the four main components of a typical imaging system in sequence
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete pipeline from scene capture to display

diagrams.title: Pixel Array Structure
diagrams.description: Illustrates how pixels are arranged in a 2D grid to form a digital image
elements: Pixel (i,j) at row i, column j
Pixel values stored in matrix f(x,y)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding spatial sampling and image representation

diagrams.title: RGB Color Model
diagrams.description: Shows additive color mixing with Red, Green, Blue
diagrams.purpose: Understanding additive color synthesis in displays

diagrams.title: CMYK Color Model
diagrams.description: Shows subtractive color mixing for printing

diagrams.title: Sampling vs Quantization
diagrams.description: Compares spatial sampling (pixel grid) and quantization (color levels)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding two key steps in A/D conversion for images

diagrams.title: CCD vs CMOS Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows structural differences between CCD and CMOS sensor pixels
